description: Style Note Lightweight and stylish, this T-shirt from adidas is comfortable and looks great. This T-shirt will keep you cool on a hot day and can be paired with denim shorts and canvas shoes for a sporty look on a day out. You can throw on a denim jacket if the temperature drops. Product Details White racer back T-shirt, has a round neckline, black graphic print in front, stitched detailing on the sides, an Adidas brand patch appliqued above the hemline, a curved hemline in front and a straight and shorter hemline at the back Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cool with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, tumble dry, bleach, iron or dry clean Dry in shade Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8& rdquo and chest 33") is wearing a size M
